---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused improvement to SignalChord
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the user, operator or contributor problem rather than only the proposed implementation.

## Proposed behavior

Describe the expected behavior and the smallest useful scope.

## Deployment impact

Explain effects on Docker, Kubernetes/Helm, persistent data, events, APIs, mobile/web clients or resource usage.

## Security, source-rights and privacy impact

Describe new trust boundaries, credentials, external services, source permissions, retention or personal-data implications.

## Community-stack impact

- [ ] The feature requires no mandatory paid service.
- [ ] The feature can remain disabled when optional credentials are absent.
- [ ] Any new dependency has an identified licence.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Behavior is testable.
- [ ] Failure and rollback behavior are defined.
- [ ] Documentation is included.
